title: Popular Choice
subTitle: A comprehensive collection of popular Bengali songs by renowned artists plays continuously, featuring some of the best music in the genre.

title: Amar Superstar
subTitle: A compilation of some of the most popular songs featuring prominent artists is played back to back in quick succession to entertain the viewers.

title: SB Public Demand
subTitle: The best of, Sangeet Bangla hits from the yesteryears (year 2000 to year 2010 ). This show is dedicated to nostalgia and music,to the memories of Bangla film music that is, songs which still have a strong recall value.

title: Howrah Bridge
subTitle: The host plays viewer-requested songs sung by famous artists and musicians and also replies to their messages sent via emails, letters or social media platforms.

title: SB Supaarhitz
subTitle: A music compilation program that plays super hit Bengali movie songs with interesting trivia's and anecdotes with regards to the particular songs.

title: SB Lyrical
subTitle: A melodious one-hour compilation of SB's blockbuster lyrical hits is played back-to-back for the entertainment of the viewers.
